## Extension type

- [ ] Integration
- [ ] Plugin
- [ ] Widget
- [ ] Bundled extension package
- [ ] Documentation or repository maintenance

## Extension details

- Package name:
- Directory:

- Required integrations:
- Capability ownership, if any:

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm validate`
- [ ] `pnpm check:extensions`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm catalog:generate`
- [ ] No secrets, `.env*`, local databases, caches, coverage, `node_modules`, or build output

## Quality checklist

- [ ] README includes setup, credentials, limitations, and screenshots for UI changes
- [ ] CHANGELOG is included
- [ ] Descriptor metadata is final, not placeholder text
- [ ] Tests include SDK conformance coverage
- [ ] Bundle impact and new dependencies are explained
- [ ] Duplicate capability/canonical-widget risk is addressed

## Notes

Mention risks, screenshots, recordings, upstream API limits, or reviewer setup notes.
